variants: Willow Farnham's journey began in Greenwill Dells, where she first nurtured her creative inclinations. She later attended Harbortide University, equipping herself with the skills necessary for a career in design. Now, she resides in the idyllic Moonberry Isles, drawing inspiration from her vibrant surroundings. Currently, Willow is a valued member of the Sundew Design Agency team, where her innovative work has gained her significant recognition. Her contributions have been celebrated with the Harborlight Ribbon, underscoring her impact in the design world.

In the picturesque Moonberry Isles, Willow Farnham finds her current home, yet her roots lie in Greenwill Dells. She is an alumna of Harbortide University, where her passion for design was further cultivated. Professionally, she contributes her talent at Sundew Design Agency, where she has carved out a reputation for her creative designs. Among her achievements, she proudly received the Harborlight Ribbon, a testament to her dedication and skill in the industry.
